alt: Microscopic cross-section showing many discrete structured cells
title: Building a Local RAG Pipeline
paragraph: How I built a local-first Retrieval-Augmented Generation system for PDF documents: parsing with Docling, structure-aware chunking, embeddings with sentence-transformers, Milvus as the vector store, and semantic retrieval via cosine similarity.

alt: Stylised illustration of a neural network
title: Retrieval Evaluation Pipeline
paragraph: How I built an automated retrieval evaluation pipeline for a local RAG system: generating a labelled Q&A dataset via clustering and an LLM, then scoring retrieval quality with Recall@K and MRR.

alt: Stylised illustration of a processor chip with layered circuits
title: Hybrid Search & Reranking
paragraph: Upgrading the vanilla RAG pipeline: fusing BM25 sparse retrieval with vector search, adding a cross-encoder reranker (BAAI/bge-reranker-v2-m3), and metadata filtering — and why each of these closes a real gap in pure vector search.

alt: Stylised illustration of stacked books and pages
title: Smarter Chunking, Sharper Retrieval
paragraph: Fixing RAG retrieval at its source: boundary-aware chunk splitting that never cuts mid-sentence, an embed-only breadcrumb that anchors each chunk to its paper and section, dropping reference sections, and abbreviation-aware sentence detection — lifting Recall@1 by 55%.
